must_have: case studies, ROI, integration clarity, security/support signals
avoid: empty hype, generic purple gradients, hidden pricing logic

must_have: one sharp use case, demo, pricing or waitlist clarity
avoid: feature sprawl, vague audience

visual_bias: high contrast, precise typography, sober status colors
must_have: fees, risk, security state, auditability, transaction feedback
avoid: playful ambiguity, unclear money movement

visual_bias: dark or high-contrast, signal/status language, gold/blue accents
must_have: wallet state, gas/fees, pending/failure/success transaction feedback
avoid: neon overload, hidden risk, unexplained jargon

visual_bias: calm palette, large readable type, high contrast
must_have: privacy, safety, appointment/medication clarity, error recovery
avoid: motion overload, tiny text, vague critical actions

visual_bias: official clarity, high contrast, low ornament
must_have: keyboard support, plain language, forms, document/status clarity
avoid: decorative complexity, low contrast, hidden routes

visual_bias: warm, clear, encouraging, playful if appropriate
must_have: progress, next lesson/action, feedback, completion state
avoid: dark complexity, jargon, unclear achievement

visual_bias: expressive type, motion, strong art direction
must_have: work samples, process, contact, case study context
avoid: corporate template, hidden portfolio

must_have: cart state, shipping, returns, reviews, payment trust
avoid: unclear pricing, weak product photos, hidden costs

visual_bias: restrained, tactile, premium imagery, slow rhythm
must_have: image quality, material detail, guarantee/service, clear purchase path
avoid: cheap effects, poor contrast, over-fast motion

must_have: shortcuts, preserved state, undo, batch actions
avoid: slow onboarding, hidden primary action

must_have: filters, export/share, data freshness, empty states
avoid: ornamental charts, no context, color-only meaning

must_have: alerts, freshness, connection, recovery path, logs/detail
avoid: static status, distracting animation, no stale state

must_have: search, filters, profiles, secure payment, report/safety
avoid: low trust signals, confusing comparison

must_have: credentials, case areas, contact, consultation path
avoid: playful style, hidden credentials, vague outcomes

must_have: menu, hours, location, booking/order, delivery info
avoid: low-quality imagery, outdated hours

visual_bias: immersive imagery, itinerary rhythm, warm trust
must_have: availability, booking, policies, map/location, gallery
avoid: complex booking, generic photos

must_have: trailer/media, platform info, community/social proof
avoid: minimalist static pages unless intentionally indie

visual_bias: calm intelligence, conversational UI, context/status visibility
must_have: capabilities, limits, privacy, latency/loading, error recovery
avoid: magic claims, hidden model state, anthropomorphic confusion

must_have: search, examples, tokens, variants, copyable snippets
avoid: no live preview, poor navigation
